case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F., A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION VS. THWE DIAMOND FREIGHT SYSTEMS INC et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F., A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT THWE DIAMOND FREIGHT SYSTEMS INC LLEWELLYN, SAGA SOMAKOUR DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-31-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-30-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-16-2012
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-31-2012 CONTINUED TO DEC-12-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-12-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-29-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST FRANK PETER AGNOST, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-29-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-13-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2013 CONTINUED TO MAR-26-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-26-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
